if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND h.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND h.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimItemStatusHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , ite.prod_nm AS claim_item_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , ite2.prod_nm AS order_item_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm , cd_cis.code_label AS claim_item_status_cd_nm FROM odh_claim_item_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN od_claim_item ite ON ite.claim_item_id = h.claim_item_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = h.claim_id LEFT JOIN od_order_item ite2 ON ite2.order_item_id = h.order_item_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cis ON cd_cis.code_grp = 'CLAIM_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_cis.code_value = h.claim_item_status_cd WHERE h.claim_item_status_hist_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimItemStatusHist :: selectList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , ite.prod_nm AS claim_item_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , ite2.prod_nm AS order_item_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm , cd_cis.code_label AS claim_item_status_cd_nm FROM odh_claim_item_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN od_claim_item ite ON ite.claim_item_id = h.claim_item_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = h.claim_id LEFT JOIN od_order_item ite2 ON ite2.order_item_id = h.order_item_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cis ON cd_cis.code_grp = 'CLAIM_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_cis.code_value = h.claim_item_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimItemStatusHist :: selectPageList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , ite.prod_nm AS claim_item_nm , cla.member_nm AS claim_nm , ite2.prod_nm AS order_item_nm , usr.user_nm AS chg_user_nm , cd_cis.code_label AS claim_item_status_cd_nm FROM odh_claim_item_status_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN od_claim_item ite ON ite.claim_item_id = h.claim_item_id LEFT JOIN od_claim cla ON cla.claim_id = h.claim_id LEFT JOIN od_order_item ite2 ON ite2.order_item_id = h.order_item_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = h.chg_user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cis ON cd_cis.code_grp = 'CLAIM_ITEM_STATUS' AND cd_cis.code_value = h.claim_item_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(h.*) /* base.ec.od :: OdhClaimItemStatusHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM odh_claim_item_status_hist h
